questions.question_text_full: In a certain code language, 6219 means ‘Sachin is a cricketer’ and 2646 means ‘He played from Mumbai’. Which of the following is the code for ‘Mumbai is very famous’?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, but mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 as per instructions.

warnings: The original options were labeled a, b, c, d. They have been mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 for the schema requirements.
